2: draft of the code. However, instead of immediately submitting this initial version, it

8: If the verdict is "False," the AI doesn't give up. It enters a thoughtful revision phase,
9: using the insights from its self-critique to pinpoint the weaknesses and intelligently

11: each iteration aiming to get closer to the goals. This process repeats until the AI finally
